_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in network operating system administration.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, reviewing harvested metadata, curating business context, and managing access.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.549), TF-S-008 (TF, cosine: 0.544).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.514). Shared vocabulary: [operating, skill]. DCWF-only terms [administration, network, system] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.893 (P=0.926, R=0.863). P exceeds R by 0.063 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.1%). "Skill in network operating system administration." and "Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, re" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.561 ≈ STS 0.514 (gap 0.048). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [operating, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [operating, skill]. DCWF-only: [administration, network, system]. WIDAI-only: [access, business, catalog, configuring, connectors, context].

signals.detail: STS 0.514 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
